title: ACDP Publish Response
description: Response returned by the registry on successful publication. Contains the assigned identifiers; full retrieval is via GET /contexts/{ctx_id}.

registry_receipt.description: OPTIONAL (0.2.0, RFC-ACDP-0010 §7): the registry's signed receipt, minted atomically with persistence. MUST be present when the registry advertises the acdp-registry-receipts profile; MUST be absent otherwise. The one 0.2.0 addition to this previously five-field closed shape — see the migration note in RFC-ACDP-0010 §12.

$comment: Closed schema. v0.1.0 responses carry exactly the five required fields (fixture pub-007); 0.2.0 receipts-profile registries add registry_receipt and nothing else.
